results.rendered_html: kṛṣṇa—dvaipāyana m. ‘black islander’, N. of Vyāsa (compiler of the  MBh.  and of the Purāṇas; so named because of his dark complexion and because he was brought forth by Satyavatī on a dvīpa or island in the Ganges),  MBh. ;  Hariv. ;  Bādar. iii, 3, 32 , Sch.;  VP.

results.rendered_html:
kṛṣṇadvaipāyana (kṛṣṇa + dvai˚) m. ein Bein. Vyāsaʼs  TRIK. 2,7,19 .  MBH. 1,94 . 2208 . 2441 . 3,309 . 14,24 .  HARIV. 1826 . 14390 .  VP. 273 . 275 . 459 .
— Vgl. kṛṣṇa und dvaipāyana, welche auch einzeln Beinamen des alten Weisen sind.
